title: roettlera mortonii
intro: Roettlera mortonii, also known as Mountain Mint, is a perennial plant native to North America, characterized by its square stems and small white flowers. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Roettlera mortonii include soothing digestive issues, relieving respiratory problems, and providing relief from muscle and joint pain. Roettlera mortonii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
